fullName: Breath Biotics Wintermint Flavour with Blis K12

userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

activeIngredients.name: BLIS K12
activeIngredients.notes: BLIS K12 (Alt. Name: Streptococcus salivarius K12) Genus: Streptococcus Species: salivarius Note: (2 Bil. CFU) (Colony-forming units)

activeIngredients.name: BLIS K12
activeIngredients.notes: BLIS K12 (Alt. Name: Streptococcus salivarius K12) Genus: Streptococcus Species: salivarius Note: (1 Bil. CFU) (Colony-forming units)

statements.notes:
GMP Manufacturing
Quality assured
Independent testing
Do not use if safety seal is broken
Once opened, store in refrigerator to maintain optimal potency
Discussion: Breath Biotics is Streptococcus salivarius K12, an oral probiotic which helps promote fresh breath and oral health.
Directions: For oral health take 1-2 lozenges daily for a minimum of 10 days. Suck lozenge for 5 minutes, do not chew or swallow. Take at least 2-3 hours before or after antibiotics.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Caution: Consult your physician before use if you are pregnant, lactating, have a medical condition, or are taking any medication.
Keep out of reach of children.
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Vegetarian

Non-GMO
Gluten free
Probiotic breath freshener & oral hygiene.
Sugar-free
Dietary Supplement
CFU: Colony-forming units
Contains: milk.
AOR guarantees that all ingredients have been declared on the label.
Made without wheat, gluten, sesame seeds, sulfites, mustard, eggs, or shellfish.
Blis K12 is a registered trademark of Blis Technologies New Zealand.
Product of Canada
To report a serious adverse event or obtain product information, call 1-866-215-0450

Independent testing Do not use if safety seal is broken Once opened, store in refrigerator to maintain optimal potency Discussion: Breath Biotics is Streptococcus salivarius K12, an oral probiotic which helps promote fresh breath and oral health. Directions: For oral health take 1-2 lozenges daily for a minimum of 10 days. Suck lozenge for 5 minutes, do not chew or swallow. Take at least 2-3 hours before or after antibiotics.
